name: 毒舌反擊型
description: 女主面對攻擊時不隱忍、不哭泣，而是用更狠的話直接懟回去。套路是對方先發難→女主用更高維度的邏輯或力量碾壓回應，語氣輕鬆甚至帶笑，反差感極強。

examples.drama_title: Witch transmigrated to ugly wife, fam hears her inner voice! rise all the way, become CEO's fave!
examples.excerpt: Dad, you mean the one who didn't believe me, kicked me out of the house, ignored 20 years of family ties, knocked me out, and dragged me to the hospital? That bastard... I'm in a good mood today. Otherwise, that hand of yours. Probably wouldn't be staying on.
